_comment: Add this structure to ios/<AppName>/Info.plist to register alternate icons. Image assets must be placed in ios/<AppName>/Images.xcassets or as loose PNG files alongside Info.plist.
_android_note: Android dynamic icon switching requires activity-aliases in AndroidManifest.xml and mipmaps in res/mipmap-{mdpi,hdpi,xhdpi,xxhdpi,xxxhdpi}/. See https://developer.android.com/guide/topics/manifest/activity-element#alias
